_meta.description: App is running, sent to background via KEYCODE_HOME, then a deep link URL triggers it back to foreground. onDeepLinking fires with FOUND.
_meta.status: CAPTURED — baselines reflect real observed payloads

preconditions: SDK fully started — startSDK result: SUCCESS confirmed in logs
App is confirmed backgrounded before triggering deep link

android: confirm PID still alive: adb shell pidof com.appsflyer.android.deviceid
ios: sleep 12 (wait for SDK start + onInstallConversionData with is_first_launch=true)
xcrun simctl spawn E112EA95-9BAE-4BE1-921C-FCCC39CF5F31 log show --predicate 'process == "Runner"' --last 30s --style compact | grep AF_QA

onDeepLinking.note: Only deep_link_value is reliably extracted for custom URI scheme URLs. Other query params (af_sub1, pid, c) are not exposed in the deepLink object for non-OneLink URLs.

onInstallConversionData_second_fire.note: onInstallConversionData fires a second time when the app is resumed via deep link. This is expected AppsFlyer SDK behavior — the SDK re-checks conversion data on app open.

onAppOpenAttribution.note: Does not fire for custom URI scheme (non-OneLink) deep links.

http_request.description: A LAUNCH event is sent when the app comes to foreground via deep link.

ios_captured.captured_from: iOS simulator E112EA95-9BAE-4BE1-921C-FCCC39CF5F31 iPhone 17, fresh install 2026-03-16
ios_captured.install_conversion_first_fire_log: [AF_QA][CALLBACK][onInstallConversionData] received: {status: success, payload: {is_first_launch: true, install_time: 2026-03-16 11:54:33.054, af_message: organic install, af_status: Organic}} (2026-03-16 13:54:38)

ios_captured.onInstallConversionData_second_fire_log: 2026-03-16 13:55:29.320 Df Runner[1767:4fba8f] (Flutter) flutter: [AF_QA][CALLBACK][onInstallConversionData] received: {status: success, payload: {is_first_launch: false, install_time: 2026-03-16 11:54:33.054, af_message: organic install, af_status: Organic}}
ios_captured.http_log_sample: 2026-03-16 13:55:28.384 Df Runner[1767:4fc6ed] [com.apple.CFNetwork:Summary] Task <82566643-335F-4702-8D06-0B8FD6FA54AC>.<19> summary for task success {transaction_duration_ms=244, response_status=200, ...}
notes: onDeepLinking fired 229ms before onInstallConversionData second fire
HTTP 200 response observed at same timestamp as onDeepLinking callback (13:55:28)
Initial onDeepLinking fires with Status.NOT_FOUND on first launch (before any deep link) — this is expected iOS SDK behavior
onAppOpenAttribution did not fire — confirmed not expected for custom URI scheme
